Love has a shape.

Create a private resonance profile and enter the weekly match field. Fit is measured through values, history, rhythm, intention, lifestyle, faith, and long-term direction — not a swipe feed.

How it works

Write a real intake, let ARBITER compute your live signature, and use the weekly field to surface eligible resonance matches.

The process

Three steps to resonance

The language stays grounded in the existing SOL intake, but the layout follows the new bones.

Step 01

Create your profile

Write a real intake, not a dating-app bio. The form captures values, history, intention, rhythm, and the kind of relationship you can actually build.

Step 02

ARBITER measures fit

Your profile text is projected through ARBITER and turned into a live harmonograph signature.

Step 03

Enter the weekly field

Eligible profiles can be measured against the active field. If the strongest match falls outside your preferences, the system moves to the next eligible fit.

Step 1 of 4

Create your profile

This is your private space. Be real and detailed — it helps surface the right resonance.

Profile shape preview
Generated from the live ARBITER projection of your profile text.

ARBITER signature appears after enough profile text is entered.

Enter the field

Fill out the private intake below. A confirmation email will be sent to you, and a copy of the submission will be delivered for review.

Who should be included in your match field?
When a higher match sits outside this range, the system can move to the next eligible match.
